home.title: Fornello Oy — Quality Roundwood from the Baltic Sea Region
home.description: Finnish timber trade specialist supplying FSC® and PEFC certified sawlogs, pulpwood, and biomass across the Baltic Sea region.

services.title: Our Services — Fornello Oy
services.description: Roundwood trading and agency, wood purchasing software, and consulting services from Fornello Oy.

contact.title: Contact — Fornello Oy
contact.description: Get in touch with Fornello Oy. Latoluomantie 30, 29100 Luvia, Finland. +358 500 110 220.

hero.headline: Reliable Timber. Responsibly Sourced.
hero.subheadline: Fornello supplies quality roundwood from the Baltic Sea region — sawlogs, pulpwood, and energy wood for industrial and energy production.

intro.body: Fornello Oy is a Finnish timber trade specialist operating across the Baltic Sea region. We connect industrial buyers with abundant, FSC®- and PEFC-certified forest resources — backed by a reliable logistics network and decades of local expertise.

sawlogs.label: Sawlogs
sawlogs.desc: High-grade logs for sawmill and structural timber production.

pulpwood.label: Pulpwood
pulpwood.desc: Consistent-quality fibre for pulp and paper manufacturing.

energy_chips.label: Energy chips
energy_chips.desc: Processed wood chips for biomass energy plants.

energy_wood.label: Energy wood
energy_wood.desc: Whole-tree biomass for heat and power generation.

supply.title: Abundant supply
supply.body: An extensive Baltic Sea cooperation network gives you access to large, consistent volumes — even during tight market conditions.

sustainability.title: Responsible sourcing
sustainability.body: Every shipment meets FSC®, PEFC, REDIII, and EUDR requirements. Sustainable forest management is how we operate, not a checkbox.

quality.title: Quality assurance
quality.body: Rigorous grading and measurement at source. You receive what was agreed, every time.

logistics.title: Reliable logistics
logistics.body: Local partnerships and efficient transport networks keep your supply chain running on schedule.

roundwood.title: Roundwood trading & agency
roundwood.body: Sourcing, brokering, and logistics for sawlogs, pulpwood, and biomass across the Baltic Sea region.

software.title: Wood purchasing software
software.body: Purpose-built tools that streamline timber procurement, measurement, and reporting.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.body: Expert guidance on procurement strategy, compliance, and market positioning.

certifications.heading: Compliance & certification
certifications.note: All sourcing meets FSC®, PEFC, REDIII, and EUDR requirements.

cta.heading: Looking for a reliable timber partner?
cta.body: We supply quality roundwood on time, every time — from a network you can trust.

services.heading: Our services
services.subheading: Three areas of expertise, one trusted partner.

roundwood.title: Roundwood trading & agency
roundwood.body: We source and broker sawlogs, pulpwood, energy chips, and energy wood across the Baltic Sea region. Our local partner network ensures consistent supply volumes and competitive pricing.

software.title: Wood purchasing software
software.body: Our software is built for the specific demands of timber procurement. Digitise measurement, automate reporting, and gain full visibility over your purchasing operations.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.body: Whether you are entering new markets, tightening compliance processes, or optimising your supply chain, our consultants bring deep industry knowledge to your challenges.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.subheading: We respond within one business day.

form.name: Full name
form.success: Thank you — we'll be in touch shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly at info@fornello.fi.

footer.tagline: Quality roundwood from the Baltic Sea region.
